title: Flat Lay of Eco-Friendly Reusable Lifestyle Products on Natural Fiber Background
description: Top view flat lay arrangement of eco-friendly reusable items including a stainless steel water bottle, bamboo toothbrush, cloth shopping bag, and organic cotton produce bags filled with apples and a sprig of rosemary. The items are placed on a textured natural fiber surface with soft natural lighting, highlighting sustainable living and zero waste concepts.
